nasb.text: Complete the week of this one, and we will give you the other also for the service which you shall serve with me for another seven years.”

esv.text: Complete the week of this one, and we will give you the other also in return for serving me another seven years.”

cnv.text: 你與大女兒七天的慶典過了以後，我們也把小女兒給你，只是你要再服事我七年。”

ccb.text: 等这七天的婚期过了，我就把拉结也许配给你，你再替我工作七年。”

csbs.text: 过完大女儿的新婚周，我们就把小女儿也给你，来换取你对我另外七年的服事。”
